name: Popcorn Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart saucepan over medium-high heat, melt the butter.
2. Cook the minced garlic and crushed oregano in the melted butter until fragrant.
3. Pour the garlic-butter mixture over the hot popcorn in a large bowl.
4. Toss the popcorn to evenly coat it with the cheese.
5. Serve and enjoy your 8 cups of Popcorn Italiano.
